info.title: Omnea Public Api
info.description:
Build powerful integrations with the Omnea REST API — a fully bidirectional interface designed to give you complete programmatic control over your data and workflows.

## Rate Limiting

The API is rate limited to 5,000 requests per 5-minute window.

schema.description:
OData filter query. Should be URL-encoded.
Note: eq and contains are case-sensitive.

Supported fields and operators:
- name (string): eq, contains
- createdAt (date): gt, ge, lt, le
- updatedAt (date): gt, ge, lt, le
- isArchived (boolean): eq

Examples:

`name eq 'Co'`, `contains(name, 'Co')`, `createdAt gt 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z`, `isArchived eq true`

Limits:
- Maximum filter length 1500 characters (measured after URL decoding)
- Maximum 10 filter expressions
- Maximum string length 255 characters per value
- Dates need to have ISO-8601 format

See https://www.odata.org/documentation/ for OData specification.

schema.description:
OData filter query. Should be URL-encoded.
Note: eq and contains are case-sensitive.

Supported fields and operators:
- email (string): eq, contains
- createdAt (date): gt, ge, lt, le
- updatedAt (date): gt, ge, lt, le

Examples:

`email eq 'Co'`, `contains(email, 'Co')`, `createdAt gt 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z`, `email eq 'Co' and createdAt gt 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z`

Limits:
- Maximum filter length 1500 characters (measured after URL decoding)
- Maximum 10 filter expressions
- Maximum string length 255 characters per value
- Dates need to have ISO-8601 format

See https://www.odata.org/documentation/ for OData specification.
